title: hedeoma palmeri var. zaragozana
intro: Hedeoma palmeri var. zaragozana, also known as palmer's pennyroyal or zaragozana hedeoma, is a variety of the Hedeoma palmeri plant, a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of palmer's pennyroyal include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a useful herb for treating colds and flu. Herbal preparations of palmer's pennyroyal can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and relief from various health conditions.
